along the road in private land Gut No.163 at

Government Order No.: No. FLD-1324/C.R.35/F-10
Mantralaya, Mumbai-400 032.
Ref.:
1) Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Nodal Officer, Maharashtra
State, Nagpur, Letter No. Desk-17/Nodal/Thane/ID-4228 15(80)/608/2023-24,
2) Revenue and Forest Department, Government of Maharashtra, Government letter
3) Regional Office, Ministry of Environment, Forests & Climate Change,
Government of India, Nagpur 'Letter FP / MH / ROAD / 422815/2023,
4) Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Nodal Officer, Maharashtra State, Nagpur, Letter No. Desk-17/FCA-S2/PID-429668/Thane/1307/2024-25, dt.30.08.2024.
5) Regional Office, Ministry of Environment, Forests & Climate Change, Government of India, Nagpur Letter FP/MH/ROAD/4228 15/2023, dt. 24.09.2024.
6) Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Nodal Officer, Maharashtra State, Nagpur, Letter No. Desk-17/Nodal/FCA/S2/PID-407380/Thane/2025- 26/1051, dt.05.08.2025.
Order :
Whereas, the Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Nodal Officer,
Maharashtra State, Nagpur, vide his letter under reference No.1 has submitted a proposal for
diversion of 0.2012 ha. Protected forest land under section-2 of the Forest (Conservation) Act,
1980 for construction of approach road including Water pipeline, Electrical line, Drainage
line along the road in private land Gut No.163 at Village Mapgaon, Tal. Alibag, Dist. Raigad,
in the State of Maharashtra;
AND whereas, the State Government vide under letter reference No.2 has sent the
proposal for approval of Regional Office (Central) Ministry of Environment, Forests &
Climate Change, Government of India, Nagpur for diversion of 0.0754335 ha. Forest land as
per approach road policy dated. 09.01.2024;
AND whereas, the Government of India after due consideration, vide letter under
Reference No.3, accorded 'In-principle' approval to divert the 0.0754335 ha. (The original area)
0.2012 ha.) forest Land for the above project under section 2 Van (Sanrakshan Evam
Samvardhan) Adhiniyam, 1980. The said approval is subject to fulfillment of certain
conditions by the User Agency;
AND whereas, the Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Nodal Officer,
Maharashtra State, Nagpur, vide letter under reference No.4 has submitted compliance of
those conditions to the Government of India;
AND whereas, the Regional Office, Ministry of Environment, Forests & Climate
Change, Government of India, Nagpur, wide under reference no. 5 Accorded 'Final Approval'
to divert the 0.0754335 ha. (original area 0.2012 ha.) of forest land in favour of Mr.
Mahendra Vasantrai Doshi and others, Mumbai for construction of approach road including
Water pipeline, Electrical line, Drainage line along the road in private land Gut No.163 at
Village Mapgaon, Tal. Alibag, Dist. Raigad, in the State of Maharashtra;
AND whereas, the Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Nodal Officer,
Maharashtra State, Nagpur vide letter under reference No.6 has requested State Government
to issue diversion order in the matter;
NOW, therefore, Government of Maharashtra hereby directs that the area of
0.0754335 ha. (original area 0.2012 ha.) consisting of Protected forest Land more specifically
described in the proposal submitted vide letter under reference No. | and as per details given in the Schedule given below, be diverted to the User Agency, 1.8. Mr. Mahendra Vasantrai
Doshi and others, Mumbai for construction of approach road including Water pipeline,
Electrical line, Drainage line along the road in private land Gut No.163 at Village Mapgaon,
Tal. Alibag, Dist. Raigad, in the State of Maharashtra;
The diversion shall be effected subject to the terms and conditions mentioned in the
letter dated 11.03.2024 and dated 24.09.2024 of Regional Office, MOEF&CC, Nagpur. This
approval for diversion of forest land is also subject to compliance of following conditions by
the User Agency-
1. Deputy Conservator of Forest, Alibag should ensure that fulfillment of condition
No. 1.2 & 1.8 mentioned in the letter dated 24.09.2024 of Regional Office,
MoEF&CC, Nagpur before giving possession of the forest land to the user agency.
2. Deputy Conservator of Forests, Alibag shall ensure that the FRA certificate is for the
land of old survey no. 94 to be diverted or obtain a revised FRA certificate before the
actual handing over of the forest land to the User Agency.
The User Agency shall comply with all the conditions stipulated in the 'in-principle' and
'Final approval 'letters of Regional Office, MoEF & CC, Nagpur, referred above. The
Chief Conservator of Forests (T), Thane shall ensure the strict compliance of the
conditions by the User Agency and shall furnish the report in this regard to Additional
Principal Chief Conservator of Forests and Nodal Officer, Maharashtra State, Nagpur
from time to time.
4. For ensuring the compliances and for monitoring the duly prescribed activities and
also to carry out other statutory duties, user agency shall facilitate unhindered
access/entry in the area to the local forest Officer. In case the user agency prohibits the
free access or create hindrances, the permission given under this Order for the
diversion of forest area for the non-forest use shall be withdrawn.
5. Non-compliance of any of the conditions mentioned in Regional Office, MoOEF&CC
letters dated 11.03.2024 and dated 24.09.2024, in this order and Rules & Guidelines
made / issued under Van (Sanrakshan Evam Samvardhan) Adhiniyam, 1980, shall
amount to violation of Van (Sanrakshan Evam Samvardhan) Adhiniyam, 1980 and
action would be taken accordingly.
6. In case of non-compliance of any of the above conditions, the Chief Conservator of
Forests (T), Thane shall report through the State Government to the Deputy Director
General of Forests (Central), Regional Office, Ministry of Environment, Forests &
Climate Change, Government of India, Nagpur as per procedure laid down in
guidelines under the Van (Sanrakshan Evam Samvardhan) Adhiniyam, 1980.
Schedule
This Government Order is available on Government of Maharashtra's website
www.maharashtra.gov.in with reference no. 202602131251494619. This order has
